scope: High-level patient-link posture contract for Phase 2 trust evaluation. Detailed confidence scoring, PDS enrichment, and matching heuristics are deferred to seq_172.

patientLinkPostures.description: No patient relationship can be asserted.
A possible patient relationship exists but cannot raise grants alone.
IdentityBindingAuthority has accepted a binding fence for the route scope.
A mismatch or competing candidate requires repair posture.
Authority review is pending and write access remains blocked.
Policy or age restriction prevents the requested access.

boundaryAssertions.statement: PatientLink may not append, supersede, freeze, or release IdentityBinding.
PatientLink outputs posture and conflict signals only; CapabilityDecisionEngine maps posture to route decisions.
Optional PDS enrichment and match confidence details are placeholders until seq_172.
PatientLink consumes evidence-envelope references and masked display hints, never evidence payloads.

manualRepairHooks.effect: Requests repair hold and capability narrowing; does not mutate IdentityBinding.
Forces recover_only or deny until IdentityBindingAuthority releases repair hold.
